creator: mel@rachie.is-a-geek.net
text:
kdebase4 fails to compile with new usb stack.

Fix: This uses the legacy headers, proper fix should be upstream.

NOTE: Since /usr/src/UPDATING doesn't mention the FreeBSD_version that marks
usb2 import, I took a guess.
How-To-Repeat: Have -CURRENT after libusb20 commit and make -C /usr/ports/x11/kdebase4 build
